meta.title: Quantum Shield - Protect Your Assets with Quantum-Resistant Cryptography
meta.description: The world's first quantum-resistant cryptographic bridge combining Dilithium-III and ZK-STARKs. Protect your assets today from tomorrow's threats.

hero.subtitle: Protect your ETH and tokens from future quantum computer attacks. Secure your assets with NIST-certified next-generation cryptography. Get started in 3 simple steps.

dilithium.title: Dilithium-III Cryptography
dilithium.description: NIST-certified lattice-based digital signatures. Next-generation cryptography that is mathematically resistant to quantum computers.
dilithium.tooltip: Dilithium is a digital signature algorithm that is secure against quantum computers. It was standardized by NIST in 2024.

timeLock.title: Time Lock Protection
timeLock.description: 24-hour security waiting period. A temporal buffer to detect and prevent unauthorized access.
timeLock.tooltip: Time Lock provides a 24-hour waiting period before asset withdrawal. This allows time to detect and prevent fraud.

zkStark.title: ZK-STARK Verification
zkStark.description: Transparency and verifiability through zero-knowledge proofs. Achieves scalability while maintaining quantum resistance.
zkStark.tooltip: ZK-STARKs allow proving validity without revealing information. They are also resistant to quantum computers.

selfCustody.title: Self-Custody
selfCustody.description: You alone control your assets. Private keys are generated and stored locally, never sent to servers.
selfCustody.tooltip: Self-custody means managing your own assets without relying on third parties.

emergency.title: Emergency Recovery
emergency.description: Peace of mind even if you lose your private key. A safety net to recover assets with a 7-day wait and bond.
emergency.tooltip: Emergency recovery allows you to recover assets by depositing collateral, even if you lose your private key.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: All transactions are verifiable on-chain. Open-source, audited smart contracts.

step1.title: Generate Keys
step1.description: Connect your wallet and generate a Dilithium key pair. The private key is stored only on your device.

step2.title: Lock Assets
step2.description: Lock ETH or ERC-20 tokens in the quantum-resistant vault. Cannot be withdrawn without Dilithium signature.

step3.title: Unlock Safely
step3.description: Request unlock with Dilithium signature. After 24-hour Time Lock, assets safely return to your wallet.

cta.title: Prepare for the Quantum Era
cta.description: Protect your assets from 'harvest now, decrypt later' attacks. Start preparing today for tomorrow's threats.

brand.description: Digital asset protection for the quantum computing era. Safeguarding your assets from future threats with NIST-certified cryptography.
